query:
-- Responsável ativo para PACSML
SELECT fru.id, fru.financial_responsible_id, fru.unit_id, fru.starts_at, fru.ends_at, fr.name
FROM financial_responsible_units fru
JOIN financial_responsibles fr ON fr.id = fru.financial_responsible_id
WHERE fru.unit_id = 210001
ORDER BY fru.starts_at DESC;

-- Verificar o registro antigo de billing_system_unit_prices com financial_responsible_id=30001
SELECT id, financial_responsible_id, unit_id, price_per_report, starts_at, ends_at
FROM billing_system_unit_prices
WHERE financial_responsible_id = 30001 AND unit_id = 210001;
